prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood textures, soft lamplight. Yuna Starling, an androgynous healer in cream and mint robes, steadies a metal shield on a workbench. Yuna Oakspire, an androgynous quartermaster in a neat vest and guild sash, uses a repair tool on the shield. Cooperative teamwork, clear motions, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous forge shot, consistent lighting and character positions. Yuna Oakspire carefully taps the final repair mark on the shield while Yuna Starling maintains a steady grip. Friendly, diligent cooperation, clear tool motion, no text, no watermark.
